name: PATCH /api/properties/:id/publish - Move property through the publish state machine
description: Admin-only state transition. Empty body defaults to status='published' (DRAFT → PUBLISHED, the common case); pass {status: 'hold' | 'sold'} to route directly to a post-publish terminal. Validates against PropertyStatusSchema; 404 when the id is gone.
skipReason: property-service runs on port 4012 (per .env MONOREPO PORT MAP); the projexlight test runner targets a single base URL (4010 = user-service). Re-enable once the API gateway/BFF lands or the runner gains per-route base-URL support.
